overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Vespucci Beach at sunset. The character traverses from dry sand into shallow ocean water and back onto the beach, eventually stopping at a campfire near a distinctive rock formation.

agents.ego_description: walking along the dry sand toward the water's edge, with the ocean to the right

entered.detail: blue and yellow lifeguard station with stairs on the left side of the beach
dense row of tall palm trees lining the beachfront
calm ocean with gentle waves lapping at the shoreline
urban buildings and structures visible in the distance across the beach
tall distinctive reddish-brown rock structure on the left side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sandy beach at sunset, with a lifeguard tower and palm trees on the left and the ocean to the right. The warm dusk lighting casts long shadows across the empty beach.

events.description: character steps into shallow ocean water, waves washing around ankles

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow surf with waves breaking around the legs

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking straight into the shallow ocean water, moving through the gentle waves. The lifeguard tower passes by on the left as the character wades through the surf.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach area with scattered landmarks

events.description: character exits the water and continues walking on wet sand toward inland

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet sand toward a campfire visible in the distance

entered.detail: small burning campfire on the sand with visible flames

segments.scene_description: Having left the water, the character walks across the open beach toward a distant campfire. The large rock formation becomes more prominent on the left while the lifeguard tower recedes into the background.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still at the campfire

agents.ego_description: standing motionless at the campfire, looking around the beach and toward the rock formation

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a stop at the campfire, standing still as the camera pans slightly. The fire burns steadily in the foreground while the large rock formation looms prominently on the left against the colorful dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal shoreline that transitions from a dry sandy beach into the ocean surf and finally toward a glowing campfire. It begins with the character walking past a lifeguard tower and palm trees under the warm, long shadows of a sunset. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the dry sand into the shallow ocean water, wading through gentle waves while the tower recedes to the left. The camera then follows the character as they exit the surf and traverse the open beach, with a large rock formation becoming increasingly prominent against the colorful dusk sky. Finally, the movement comes to a halt at a steadily burning campfire, leaving the character standing still beside the looming rocks.
